domain_entity.brief: A single step within a workflow instance.
domain_entity.description:
Records the execution of one step in a saga workflow, including the step
index, name, status, request/response payloads, and timing. Steps reference
their parent workflow instance via workflow_id.

primary_key.description: UUID primary key for the workflow step.

columns.name: workflow_id
columns.description: FK reference to the parent workflow instance.

columns.name: step_index
columns.description: Zero-based ordinal position of this step within the workflow.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Step status: pending, in_progress, completed, failed, compensated.

columns.name: request_json
columns.description: Serialised JSON payload sent to the downstream service for this step.

columns.name: response_json
columns.description: Serialised JSON response received from the downstream service.

columns.name: error
columns.description: Human-readable error message if the step failed.

columns.name: started_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the step began executing.

columns.name: completed_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the step reached a terminal state.
